I will soon probably will record a video on it soon, but whoever created this game, you did a good job.

As a content creator I say this was really entertaining are usually play through the games before I post any videos on them I played through the game and took me four hours to unlock all the levels I think it was really good and almost likely be posting about it on my channel really good game 10 out of 10

reviews.review_title: The game WAS great! Broken after update.
reviews.review_description: Was really enjoying this game and look forward to the final release. The latest update has broken the game though and the character is just stuck in the floor when you first spawn in, making it no longer playable.

I tried to download this for my oculus quest through this page and it didn't work I have the oculus app on my pc which lets me get app lab games and this one just lies to you, it says purchased but I see it nowhere on my oculus app. Please remove this game from the page so people don't get tricked.

I frickin love this game, it's not too simple but also not so complicated.the lore is kind of interesting (yes there is actual lore) and controls feel great! But I wish that I could move by pressing a button instead of using the joystick (sorry, I'm just scared of joystick drift)
Why cant I play it

developer_response.body: Hey can you elaborate? Try to restart your Quest and check if the game is properly installed. Hope that helps.

reviews.review_description: I have a VERY fun time with the throwing knife it's fun and easy to use the bosses and mobs are unique and every time you go into the dungeon you get a different one everytime

it’s not
letting me download but i’m on v23

developer_response.body: Hey be sure to check in your "not installed tab on the Quest" if that does not work, try restarting the Quest or search in your Oculus mobile app for "Ancient Dungeon Beta" and try to install it from there

reviews.review_title: wont work cant download even when i do
reviews.review_description: click uninstalled

developer_response.body: Hey check in your headset under "not installed" if it appears.

reviews.review_title: Suprised by how fun this is!
reviews.review_description: Brilliant so far I would have paid money for this and will as soon as I can!
It's really fun and somehow spooky in a way most fun game I have played on vr so far

reviews.review_title: It’s a great game and love the experienc
reviews.review_description: I like it but I would think that checkpoints would be a great idea because since you have so much to go and limited amount of hearts it is pretty difficult for me. Just a suggestion
Endless replayabilty, great concept, I don’t have the words to describe it but it’s a piece of art
This game is challenging and scary but yet so fun. This game is spot on, congratulations to the devs you guys did an amazing job and make

Although it lives into that same trope of starting on the same level, I love that you've got the idea to do branching paths. I'd love to see more branches.... Probably the main thing that kills me in rogue likes is the repetitive nature of them. I also loved that the first boss wasn't the same every time. More weapons would be cool too, but I'm sure that's definitely on the list. 

Otherwise, love the environment, love the feel of the game.  Love the lighting. Love the simplicity of it. I accidentally played until my quest died earlier (from first on) because I was so intrigued by the little world you had me running through. Great job overall guys!

As someone new to the quest 2 and as someone that loves fantasy games, this is game was a no brainer. It upates often and while the content is limited, it has much replayability! Support the dev team.

I'm absolutely amazed. Game mechanics are very smooth and impressive, environments are almost fully interactive and very immersive. The throwing knife mechanic along with the pixel and particle effects are simply perfect. Though the game can be smoothed out I can honestly say I am more than impressed and stoked to see what the developers do for this game next. :)

reviews.review_title: One of the more fun games on VR.
reviews.review_description: I found the game fun however it has room to improve one of the main things is i wish there was classes stuff like bow users and magic users stuff like that but over all a fun vr game.
